result.stdout:
Custom Mediator Generator Tool
Usage: CustomMediatorGeneratorTool <inputFolderPath> <outputFolderPath> <namespace>
Arguments:
  <inputFolderPath>    Path to the input folder containing .cs files.
  <outputFolderPath>   Path to the output folder for generated registrations.
  <namespace>          Namespace for the generated code.
